description_long: This is a large, detached suburban house set on a spacious green lawn with a circular driveway leading to the main entrance. The house features a complex, multi-gabled roof with gray shingles and several dormer windows, giving it a stately appearance. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by white columns, and the entryway is accentuated by a small set of steps and decorative landscaping. Multiple windows of varying sizes are symmetrically arranged across the exterior, with some grouped in pairs and others as single units. The property is surrounded by evenly spaced deciduous trees, and there is a secondary structure or garage attached to one side. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern suburban architectural elements.
description: A large, multi-gabled suburban house with a circular driveway, covered porch, and symmetrical window arrangement, set on a landscaped lawn with trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, circular driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage, a row of trees, and the extended driveway curving around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and more trees lining the property edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage doors, secondary entry, and the driveway looping away from the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some grouped and some single windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with white columns, small steps, and landscaped approach
